Finn Thiesen

Projects

Networking
🏫 👤
18 weeks
I created a networking library using windows Winsock2, this enables programmers to create advanced network applications.
This library was made to easily add to your own project and use.
I myself, used this library to create multiple multiplayer games, including a 2D shooter and multiplayer Blender.
2024 / 2025

Weather Simulation
🏠 👤
1 year
I am very obsessed with the weather, thus I decided to create a weather simulation from scratch.
This simulates the air flow through the troposphere.
Creating a simulation like this involves creating a fluid simulation, usage of complex formulas and optimization using the GPU (CUDA in my case).
2025 / 2026

GoingBonkers!
🏫 👥
8 weeks
Together with a team of artists, designers and programmers, I helped creating a game called GoingBonkers!.
This game was made inside Unreal Engine using blueprints
This was during the last block of my second year at BUAS, with the main objective being; working in a big team on a project. 2025

About me

My name is Finn Thiesen, I am 19 years old.
I am currently studying C++ programming at the BUAS in Breda as a year 3.
This personal website contains information about my programming career. This includes blogs and projects I created.

I worked on many interesting projects, such as networking, a real-time weather simulation and a recreation of 2D and 3D Pitfall!

I classify myself as a general programmer, since I tend to like programming all kinds of different parts of a game.

Experience

I started programming on scratch since the start of high school.
This I enjoyed very much, just to create random games very easily.
Its only in the 4th and 5th grade of high school that I started programming a bit more in computer science.
I decided to go to BUAS as my study. For this I had to make an intake game.
This took some time, since it was my first time diving deep into C++.
But I succeeded and got into the study.
Since then I kept programming during school and also during my freetime.
Now I am a general programmer and love to do many different things.
I love to combine my hobby of meteorology with programming and create handy practical features I could use.
